Who We Are

Nigeria's Most Trusted Solar Company

Founded in 2008, TECIL Solar is the renewable energy division of Tecil Integrated Services Limited — operating across Lagos, Port Harcourt, Calabar, Uyo, Ikom and beyond for over 16 years.

We deliver end-to-end solar solutions — from a single home installation to a 60KW off-grid industrial system. Our edge isn't the cheapest price. It's technical depth, honest advice, and systems that outlast their warranties.

ExcellenceInnovationIntegritySustainability
Our Track Record Our Services
16+ Years operating
7 Active branches
34+ Projects delivered
15+ Brand partnerships

"To build a reputation as the leading, most knowledgeable, most reliable and most customer-friendly renewable energy company in Africa."

TECIL Solar — Mission Statement

What We Do

End-to-End Solar Services

From a single home system to a 60KW off-grid industrial project — we handle everything: supply, design, install, maintain, train.

All Services
01 Installation

System Installation & Commissioning

We design and install solar and inverter systems for homes, businesses, and institutions, then test and document everything before handover.

View details
02 Maintenance

Maintenance & Repair

Preventive servicing and reactive fault resolution that keep your system stable, efficient, and dependable year after year.

View details
03 Assessment

Load Assessment & Technical Advisory

We help you invest wisely — matching the right system to your actual load, usage pattern, and budget before a single component is purchased.

View details
04 Supply

Product Supply & Procurement

Panels, inverters, batteries, controllers, and accessories sourced for quality, compatibility, and long-term value from 15+ authorised brands.

View details
05 EPC Projects

Large-Scale EPC Projects

Turnkey engineering, procurement, and construction for institutions, government agencies, and industrial clients. Fully documented delivery.

View details
06 Training

Training & Capacity Building

We train users and technicians so systems perform better and remain easier to manage. The 2026 roadmap includes the TECIL Solar Training Institute.

View details
Who We Serve

One Company. Every Energy Need.

Whether you're a homeowner, an SME, a government institution, or a developer — TECIL Solar has been solving your energy problem since 2008.

🏠 Homeowners

Stop paying generator bills every month.

TECIL Solar systems are built for the Nigerian home — designed for your load, our weather, and years of reliable service. Your neighbours will notice.

  • Quiet, clean power 24/7
  • Lower long-term running cost
  • Systems that outlast their warranties
Talk to us
🏪 Businesses

Downtime costs money.

A properly specified TECIL Solar system keeps your business running when the grid fails — and pays for itself faster than you think.

  • Zero-downtime operations
  • Predictable energy cost
  • Better productivity and customer experience
Talk to us
🏛 Institutions

We’ve delivered for serious institutions across Nigeria.

From universities and hospitals to military facilities and consulates, we have the project history and credentials to meet your procurement standards.

  • Procurement-ready documentation
  • Proven institutional track record
  • Commissioning reports and SLA handover
Talk to us
🏗 Contractors & Developers

A reliable solar partner with proven delivery.

We supply, install, commission — and document everything. Our 15+ brand partnerships and 34+ projects speak for us.

  • Verified delivery history
  • Full project documentation
  • Multi-site and phased rollout capability
Talk to us
Who We Are

16 Years of Solar Expertise. One Standard.

Watch how TECIL Solar has been solving Nigeria's power problem — one system at a time, for homes, businesses, and institutions across 5 states.

Track Record

34+ Corporate Projects Since 2014

Full Portfolio
Apr 2018 Industrial

Biase Plantations Ltd (Wilmar)

60KW Solar + 72KVA Hybrid Inverters — fully off-grid system for industrial plantation operations

₦48M
Dec 2016 Infrastructure

Cross River Basin Dev. Authority

Solar street light network across Cross River State — large-scale public infrastructure

₦27.5M
2022 Commercial

Uddyking Oil Ltd (3 projects)

20–30KVA Hybrid Systems with Lithium Battery Banks for oil industry operations

₦40M+
Apr 2022 Institutional

Unical Microfinance Bank HQ

15KVA Hybrid Inverter + 18KW Solar for institutional banking headquarters

₦12M
Nov 2020 Education

Mater Elizabeth High School

All-in-One Solar Street & Floodlights — full campus lighting infrastructure

₦13M
Oct 2020 Education

Renaissance University, Enugu

Solar street & floodlights and staff quarters solar systems

₦9M

Your Project Could Be Next.

Universities, hospitals, government agencies, industrial estates — we have the track record and credentials to match your brief.

Discuss Your Project
Client Voices

What Our Clients Say

From military facilities to hotels, universities to oil companies — TECIL Solar's track record speaks through the clients who trust us with their energy.

★★★★★
5.0 Average client rating
★★★★★
"TECIL Solar installed our 15KVA hybrid system at the bank headquarters. The team was professional, the documentation thorough, and the system has been running without fault since commissioning."
SM
Senior Management Unical Microfinance Bank, Calabar
Institutional Client
★★★★★
"We needed a reliable solar sub-contractor for a university campus project. TECIL Solar delivered on spec, on time, and gave us full commissioning reports. We've used them twice since."
PD
Project Director South-East University Campus
EPC Project Client
★★★★★
"From the load assessment to final handover, the team was knowledgeable and honest. They didn't oversell us a bigger system than we needed. The hotel has had zero downtime since."
OM
Operations Manager Happkings Hotel, Ikom
Commercial Client
★★★★★
"Our fuel bills dropped significantly after the TECIL Solar installation. The after-sales support has been excellent — they respond quickly whenever we have a question."
BO
Business Owner SME Client, Port Harcourt
Commercial Client
